item.title: The History - Book 6 (Erato) by Herodotus
item.description: Author: Herodotus Summary (Slides by nblm) Thoughts It is not enough if just a leader has the will and discipline. It has to go into the people also.

item.description: Source: a16z.com/the-techno-optimist-manifesto/ Our civilization was built on technology. Our civilization is built on technology.

item.title: Luminous Infinitus
item.description: Hi there! I’m Rob. I also go by Robin or Robinson. Welcome to my personal website.

item.title: Thomas - Aathmadharshanam
